description.value: These blades come in a variety of shapes and styles, but they are typically 2 feet long.

Activate A Strike

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 3d6 persistent acid damage, and 3 acid splash damage. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 3d8 fire damage, 3 persistent fire damage, and 3 fire splash damage. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

Activate A Strike

Bottled lightning is packed with volatile reagents that create a blast of electricity when they are exposed to air. Bottled lightning deals 3d6 electricity damage and 3 electricity splash damage. On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

Activate 1 Strike

The liquid reagents in this vial rapidly absorb heat when exposed to air. A frost vial deals the listed cold damage and cold splash damage. On a hit, the target takes a status penalty to its Speeds until the end of its next turn. Many types of frost vial also grant an item bonus to attack rolls.

You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls, the bomb deals 3d6 cold damage and 3 cold splash damage, and the target takes a -10-foot penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]{Effect: Frost Vial}

Adventurers who don't wear armor travel in durable clothing. Though it's not armor and uses your unarmored defense proficiency, it still has a Dex Cap and can grant an item bonus to AC if etched with potency runes.

Activate A Interact

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature''s natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain @Damage[(7d6+18)[healing]] Hit Points and gain +2 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life}

Venom from enormous purple worms leaves a victim weakened.

Activate 2 Interact (Injury)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:34]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[5d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and enfeebled 2 (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]] damage and enfeebled 2 (1 round)

Distilled from the Plane of Shadow, this oily substance imposes tenebrous effects. The enfeebled condition from shadow essence lasts for 24 hours.

Activate 2 Interact (Injury)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:34]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[3d6[void]] damage and @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[3d6[void]] damage, @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[3d6[void]] damage, @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage, and enfeebled 2 (1 round)

Blue Viper carries the following infused items: 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.jC8GmH0Un6vDxdMj]{Acid Flask (Greater)}, 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.n5yTlTs63o53n3k6]{Alchemist's Fire (Greater)}, 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Cc4SokzVBoBCkHId]{Blightburn Resin}, 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.r2iTRbt1zpkAqHj2]{Bottled Lightning (Greater)}, 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.87AzvRja9uQOLJCC]{Deathcap Powder}, 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.mYozcVg9fQY6zO7C]{Elixir of Life (Greater)}, 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.intVPcEzbE9o4NQd]{Frost Vial (Greater)}, 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.76T49dJYfxIrPvQe]{Malyass Root Paste}, 9 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.iRDCa4OVSTGUD3vi]{Purple Worm Venom}, 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Wjkw0lEUOhypYvzo]{Shadow Essence}, and 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.oOXvk18K4izaJzG7]{Spider Root}. These items last for 24 hours, or until the next time Blue Viper makes his daily preparations.

Trigger A creature adjacent to Blue Viper hits him with a melee unarmed Strike.

Effect The triggering creature is exposed to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.8qUja4YdvewN4es0]{Death Knell Powder}. This consumes the poison, and Blue Viper can't use Poisoned Coat again until he spends 10 minutes applying one dose of contact or injury poison to his clothing.

When Blue Viper successfully Strikes an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creature with a poisoned weapon or exposes an off-guard creature to an inhaled poison, the creature takes a -2 circumstance penalty to its initial save against that poison.

Requirements Blue Viper is holding a contact or injury poison.

Effect Blue Viper swigs the poison and sprays it out of his mouth, affecting a @Template[cone|distance:15]. Blue Viper isn't exposed to the poison. All creatures in the cone are immediately exposed to the poison and each creature must attempt a Fortitude save against the poison.
Blue Viper's infused poisons have a DC of 34.
Blue Viper Interacts to draw an injury poison and applies it to a weapon he is holding.

Activate 2 Interact

This poison is made from toxic spores reduced to a gray powder and suffused with necromantic energy. If a creature is reduced to 0 Hit Points while under the effect of death knell powder, it must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:34|traits:death] save or die (this is a death effect). If a creature dies from death knell powder, a random creature adjacent to the victim is bolstered by its departing life force and gains 20 temporary HP and a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls for 10 minutes.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:34]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[7d6[poison]] (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[9d6[poison]] (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[12d6[poison]] (1 round)

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.dLdRqT6UxTKlsPgp]{Death Knell}.

Activate 1 Interact

This heavier-than-air mist emits a soft glow. While this poison lasts, it causes its victims to shine from within with agonizing, brilliant radiance. This effect has the light trait (although the poison itself doesn't, so only the light effect can be counteracted by darkness effects). The @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition from daylight vapor can't be removed while the poison lasts, and when the victim enters an area of magical darkness, the poison attempts to counteract the darkness with a counteract modifier of +21. If the poison fails, it can't attempt to counteract the same darkness again.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:31]

Onset 1 round

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[4d6[poison]] damage and sickened 1 (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[10d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} (1 round)

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.a3aQxCpoj1q1NQxC]{Sunburst}.

publication.title: Pathfinder #160: Assault on Hunting Lodge Seven

description.value:
Activate 2 Interact

This poison is made from toxic spores reduced to a gray powder and suffused with necromantic energy. If a creature is reduced to 0 Hit Points while under the effect of death knell powder, it must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:34|traits:death] save or die (this is a death effect). If a creature dies from death knell powder, a random creature adjacent to the victim is bolstered by its departing life force and gains 20 temporary HP and a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls for 10 minutes.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:34]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[7d6[poison]] (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[9d6[poison]] (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[12d6[poison]] (1 round)

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.dLdRqT6UxTKlsPgp]{Death Knell}.

Activate 1 Interact

Gorgon's breath is a fine powder that can easily enter living creatures' bloodstreams through their lungs before binding to mucous membranes and causing any nearby soft tissues to harden.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Onset 1 round

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] and slowed 1 (1 round)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified} (1 round)

Stage 4 petrified permanently

Upon being mixed and injected into the bloodstream, this powder of the crimson orchid quickly assaults the brain and nerves, disrupting the victim's ability to piece together coherent thoughts and spells.

Activate 3 Interact (Injury)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[2d6[mental]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[3d6[mental]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4} (1 round)
